race.comment: Open race to close out the card. ELLIS BEACH (4) has a handy record here on his come circuit with two wins and a second from six starts and has been given a bit of a freshen up since that last-start placing here. Should be hitting the line with gusto. INTRUDER (8) has gotten better with each run this time in and looks to be building up to another victory. Include with the claim. TALONS (9) is a two-time winner here who is drawn to get a cosy run in transit from the inside marble. Top-three commodity on best form. SKOGAFOSS (13) looks one for the exotics players.
